lessons.title: Baroque Era
lessons.subtitle: An ornate world of drama, counterpoint, and trumpet fanfares.
traits: Rich ornamentation and complex polyphonic textures.
Use of basso continuo and elaborate vocal lines.

lessons.title: Classical Era
lessons.subtitle: Balanced phrasing, clear structure, and elegant melodies.
traits: Clear forms like sonata-allegro and rondo.
Melodies that are graceful, simple, and memorable.

lessons.title: Romantic Era
lessons.subtitle: Expressive, emotional, and rich with personal storytelling.
traits: Freer forms and intense emotional content.
Use of expressive harmony and colorful orchestration.

quiz.question: This piece features sweeping melodies, lush orchestration, and emotional depth. What era does it most likely belong to?
This piece showcases clear structure, balanced melodies, and elegant phrasing. What era does it most likely belong to?
This piece demonstrates intricate polyphony, ornamentation, and contrapuntal complexity. What era does it most likely belong to?
This piece bursts with virtuosic piano passages, dramatic contrasts, and expressive nationalism. What era does it most likely belong to?
This piece highlights fast, virtuosic passages, ritornello form, and lively rhythms. What era does it most likely belong to?
